'''Korphir''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] planet during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

It served as a temporary home to fugitive [[Havet Storm]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]. The young boy found employ there acting as a mind reader in a circus, until his fellow performers grew suspicious of his strange abilities and failed an attempt on his life.

Understandably, this caused Storm to leave the planet.

{{Planet-stub}}
